TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox person Yukan Temu (lalu na theluw: 潘君侖; lalu na ego: Masha Pan; ryax sa 2 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1994 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. girang hintgan. msqutux ka GTM. myugi ru mqwas ega 2022 - Batu : Hawa 2022 - Kueytyansya : Ryusawcun teribi dorama 2015 - Ryawrikawsyawsen 2016 - Uwheuwdesiciswe 2017 - Siciwangcyangda hngzyang qwas 不完美紳士 OKAY qabu' te 26 Cincicyang - 最佳演唱組合獎 Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Facebook Instagram YouTube
S.PHON: panmwo:in*oβox pers~ɕon jukan temu (lalu na tħeluw: ***; lalu na eɣo: mas~ɕħa pan; rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu ) ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq ka mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ ʔtajal tajwan. ɣiraŋ ħintɣan. ms~ɕqutux ka ɣtm. mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ eɣa **** - βatu : ħawa **** - kuejtjans~ɕja : rjus~ɕawʦ~ʨun teriβi *orama **** - rjawrikaws~ɕjaws~ɕen **** - uwħeuw*es~ɕiʦ~ʨis~ɕwe **** - s~ɕiʦ~ʨiwaŋʦ~ʨjaŋ*a ħŋzjaŋ qwas~ɕ ***** okaj qaβuʔ te ** ʦ~ʨinʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨjaŋ - ******* ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ *aʦ~ʨeβook ins~ɕtaɣram joutuβe
S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox person Yukan Temu (lalu na theluw: 潘君侖; lalu na ego: Masha Pan; ryax sa 2 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1994 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. girang hintgan. msqutux ka GTM. myugi ru mqwas ega 2022 - Batu : Hawa 2022 - Kueytyansya : Ryusawcun teribi dorama 2015 - Ryawrikawsyawsen 2016 - Uwheuwdesiciswe 2017 - Siciwangcyangda hngzyang qwas 不完美紳士 OKAY qabu' te 26 Cincicyang - 最佳演唱組合獎 Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Facebook Instagram YouTube
S.PHON: panmwo:in*oβox pers~ɕon jukan temu (lalu na tħeluw: ***; lalu na eɣo: mas~ɕħa pan; rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu ) ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq ka mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ ʔtajal tajwan. ɣiraŋ ħintɣan. ms~ɕqutux ka ɣtm. mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ eɣa **** - βatu : ħawa **** - kuejtjans~ɕja : rjus~ɕawʦ~ʨun teriβi *orama **** - rjawrikaws~ɕjaws~ɕen **** - uwħeuw*es~ɕiʦ~ʨis~ɕwe **** - s~ɕiʦ~ʨiwaŋʦ~ʨjaŋ*a ħŋzjaŋ qwas~ɕ ***** okaj qaβuʔ te ** ʦ~ʨinʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨjaŋ - ******* ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ *aʦ~ʨeβook ins~ɕtaɣram joutuβe
